caption: Two men sit in a room in front of a television and a soundbar, with a shelf of media cases behind them. The man on the left wears a dark green t-shirt, and the man on the right wears a grey t-shirt and a necklace with a pendant. Above them, glowing yellow text reads "OUR STUPID REACTIONS". A smaller screen in front of them displays footage of a character with a bald head and a cape. In the first frame, the man on the left has his hand over his mouth, and the man on the right is also touching his face. As the sequence progresses, the man on the left lowers his hand and looks toward the other man. The man on the right maintains his posture, resting his hand near his mouth. The content on the small screen changes from a close-up of the bald character's head to a wider shot of the character standing in a gothic arched doorway.
